_comment: WordPress sync is DISABLED on purpose (2026-06-07). Pushing the static-site HTML into WordPress stripped its design (WP renders in its own theme), so we restored the originals and stopped syncing. GitHub Pages is the designed public site; WordPress keeps its own design. To RE-ENABLE for a specific page, add it back to `pages` below. Known IDs (verified 2026-06): home 154, contact 38, videos 37, podcast 36, speaking 35.
